metadata.internalErrorPolicy: carry prior; isolated first error is zero; all-services first error voids challenge-round

historicalEvidence.note: Deleted-game topology and burst signatures are consistent with lifecycle load traffic, not player evidence.

formulaDefinitions.current: Retired fixed rarity pot: each capturer gets P/k; victim loses P.
formulaDefinitions.sqrt: Conserved coverage transfer X=P*sqrt(k/M), split X across k capturers.
formulaDefinitions.flat: No-rarity conserved transfer X=P*k/M, so every capturer gets P/M.
formulaDefinitions.normalized: No-rarity conserved coverage: ATK=0.45*targets/M, DEF=-0.45*capturers/M, SLA=q.
formulaDefinitions.scarcity: Bounded scarcity transfer X=0.45*(k/M)*(2-k/M), split across k capturers; victim loses X.
formulaDefinitions.maturity: Maturity-gated scarcity share=(0.45/M)*[1+w(A)*(1-k/A)], A=|C union Q_v|; victim loses k*share.
formulaDefinitions.positiveDefense: Maturity ATK uses weight 0.30 with no victim debit; each active attacker funds up to 0.5*ATK across healthy missed targets, and uptime scales DEF.
formulaDefinitions.matrix: Active-attacker pair pots; non-capture is not proof of an attempted block.
formulaDefinitions.bounded: 40% normalized coverage + 35% remaining defense coverage + 25% SLA credit.
formulaDefinitions.boundedOffenseHeavy: 45% normalized coverage + 30% remaining defense coverage + 25% SLA credit.
formulaDefinitions.manualArithmetic: Offline governance control: Core=0.5*A+0.5*D; accepted flags set A, pairwise protected opportunities set D, and local SLA R multiplies the whole fixed-budget score.
formulaDefinitions.manualBalanced: Deployed official EpochBalanced policy: Core=0.4*A+0.4*D+0.2*sqrt(A*D); accepted flags set A, pairwise protected opportunities set D, and local SLA R multiplies the whole fixed-budget score.

scenarioDefinitions.commonAiExploit: One flag moves from one capturer to every eligible capturer.
scenarioDefinitions.lateExclusiveProxy: A sole late capturer is compared with a field-wide common path without asserting patch causality.
scenarioDefinitions.earlyFarmerVsLateAdapter: Identical exclusive sweeps occur in the first two versus last two epochs.
scenarioDefinitions.defenseSla: An active attacker captures peers while one healthy target remains uncaptured; this is observational, not proof of an attempt.
scenarioDefinitions.collusionControl: One valid capture is compared with the same flag submitted by the full eligible field.
